## 📝 Summary
Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed.

## 🛠 Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 🚀 Quality Checklist
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] My changes pass the ShellCheck linting tests.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] I have verified that my changes do not break existing tracker sourcing.

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
If you've added a new feature or visual change, please include a screenshot or logs here.
